Breen Pelleted Organic.description: Mini red romaine; West Coast recommends for hydroponic/aquaponic; good swap for indoor romaine SKU.

Truchas Pelleted Organic.description: Mini red romaine; West Coast notes spacing as close as 15cm; companion to Breen/Newham/Spretnak set.

Amaze.description: Red Little Gem style mini head; product spec shifts to Little Gem; good for colour mix.

Spretnak Organic.description: Little Gem type romaine but long package DTM; likely requires harvest immature or longer cycle indoors.

Little Gem.description: Heirloom mini romaine; long package DTM suggests longer turns unless harvested small.

Alkindus Pelleted Organic.description: Butterhead; West Coast recommends for hydroponic/aquaponic; substantial heads, likely longer turn if grown to size.

Newham Pelleted Organic.description: Mini heads rather than full butterhead; Newham has tight butterhead-like centre but is a Little Gem type.

Hampton Eazyleaf Organic.description: Oakleaf one-cut; high leaf count; spacing/harvest options for full head or looseleaf with regrowth.

Eazyleaf Blend Organic.description: Blend (2 green + 2 red Eazyleaf) for baby leaf or full heads; useful for mix program.

Ilema Organic.description: Lollo bionda Eazyleaf-type; recommended for hydro/aquaponic via pelleted listing; more frilly green than oakleaf.

Brentwood Eazyleaf Organic.description: Red ruffled Eazyleaf; shelf-life positioning; good red component swap (changes leaf type).

Burgandy Eazyleaf Organic.description: Red tango Eazyleaf; adds crunch/colour; changes leaf type from oakleaf.

KX-1 Kale (baby leaf).description: Shift to baby-leaf kale genetics that hold small size longer; keep kale-family setpoints, shorten duration.

Magenta Sunset Swiss Chard.description: Replace giant-stalk chard with baby-leaf-capable chard; keep chard-family setpoints, shorten duration.

Seaside F1 Spinach (baby leaf).description: Move to dedicated baby-leaf hybrid; keep spinach-family setpoints but shorten; still requires strong root-disease controls.

Tropicana Pelleted Organic.description: Batavia-type loose-leaf lettuce. Pelleted organic seed. Best bolt resistance of any loose-leaf type. Recommended for hydroponic and aquaponic growing. West Coast Seeds SKU LT464. pH 6.0-6.5.

Microgreen Broccoli Organic.description: Fast-growing brassica microgreen. Rich in sulforaphane. Harvest at cotyledon stage. West Coast Seeds SKU MG195. OP seed.

Microgreen Sunflower Organic.description: Large succulent microgreen with mild nutty flavor. 25% protein by weight. Pre-soak seed 24 hours. West Coast Seeds SKU MG435. OP seed.

Microgreen Pea Shoots.description: Sweet flavor, crunchy texture. Dwarf Grey sugar variety. Harvest at 8-10cm tall. West Coast Seeds SKU MG592. OP seed.

Microgreen Radish Organic.description: Colorful pink stems with mild spicy radish flavor. Very fast growing. Rich in vitamins A, C, E, K. West Coast Seeds SKU MG111. OP seed.

Microgreen Arugula.description: Peppery flavor microgreen. Fast germination. Excellent in salads and as garnish. West Coast Seeds.

Microgreen Kale.description: Mild kale flavor microgreen. Nutritious and easy to grow. West Coast Seeds. OP seed.

Microgreen Basil.description: Aromatic basil microgreen. Slower germination than brassicas. Flavor-dense at harvest. West Coast Seeds.

Microgreen Beet.description: Vibrant red-stemmed microgreen with earthy beet flavor. Slower growing. Soak seeds before planting. West Coast Seeds.

Microgreen Pac Choi.description: Mild Asian green microgreen. Fast growing brassica. Good for stir-fry garnish. West Coast Seeds.

Microgreen Swiss Chard.description: Colorful stems, mild flavor. Larger seeds, sow less densely. West Coast Seeds.

Microgreen Kohlrabi.description: Purple-stemmed brassica microgreen. Mild cabbage flavor. Fast growing. West Coast Seeds.

Sprout Alfalfa Organic.description: Classic sprouting seed. Mild nutty flavor. Very easy to grow in jars. West Coast Seeds. Organic.

Sprout Broccoli Organic.description: High in sulforaphane. Mild flavor. Popular health food sprout. West Coast Seeds. Organic.

Sprout Sandwich Booster Mix Organic.description: Blend of sprouting seeds for sandwiches. Mixed flavors and textures. West Coast Seeds. Organic.

Sprout Mung Bean Organic.description: Classic bean sprout. Thick crunchy sprout for stir-fry. Grow in dark for white sprouts. West Coast Seeds. Organic.

Sprout Yellow Mustard Organic.description: Spicy mustard flavor sprout. Fast growing. West Coast Seeds. Organic.

Sprout Salad Mix Organic.description: Blend of sprouting seeds for salads. Mixed textures and mild flavors. West Coast Seeds. Organic.

Sprout Radish Organic.description: Spicy radish flavor. Pink-tinged sprouts. Fast growing. West Coast Seeds. Organic.

Sprout Wheatgrass Organic.description: Grown in soil for juicing. Needs light after day 3. Popular health tonic. West Coast Seeds. Organic.

Sprout Red Clover Organic.description: Mild clover flavor. Thin delicate sprouts. Easy jar sprouting. West Coast Seeds. Organic.

Sprout Brown Mustard Organic.description: Hot mustard flavor sprout. Stronger than yellow mustard. West Coast Seeds. Organic.

Sprout Go Go Mix Organic.description: Sprouting seed blend. Quick growing mixed sprouts. West Coast Seeds. Organic.

Sprout Green Peas Organic.description: Sweet pea-flavored sprouts. Larger sprouts with crunch. West Coast Seeds. Organic.

Sprout Gourmet Mix Organic.description: Premium blend of sprouting seeds. Varied flavors and textures. West Coast Seeds. Organic.

Sprout Bean Salad Mix Organic.description: Blend of bean sprouting seeds for salads. Hearty texture. West Coast Seeds. Organic.

Sprout Adzuki Bean Organic.description: Sweet nutty flavored bean sprout. Popular in Asian cuisine. West Coast Seeds. Organic.

Sprout Green Hunter Organic.description: Sprouting blend with green theme. Nutritious mixed sprouts. West Coast Seeds. Organic.

Sprout Green Lentils Organic.description: Mild lentil-flavored sprouts. Quick sprouting legume. West Coast Seeds. Organic.

Sprout Barley Organic.description: Grain sprout for health drinks and salads. Good source of enzymes. West Coast Seeds. Organic.
